Put the Power of Contrast into Practice
Prepare for Mastermind Collaboration Session 2! Following the successful first collaboration session, it's time to maximize the
power of contrast for your influence cases. Remember, "If you can't find contrast, you aren't looking hard enough." Don't tackle
these hurdles alone; join forces to solve problems together.
